ext.description: Llama Chat Assistant local chat and RAG assistant for VS Code.
config.chat.title: Llama Chat Assistant › Chat
config.llamaCpp.title: Llama Chat Assistant › llama.cpp
config.chromaDb.title: Llama Chat Assistant › chromadb
config.temperature.description: The generation temperature for the model.
config.model.description: Model name sent in OpenAI-compatible chat requests.
config.debug.description: Enable verbose logs and basic runtime metrics in the extension output.
config.maxAttachedFileSizeKb.description: Maximum size in KB for manually attached files.
config.chat.directLlmTemplate.descriptio: Template object used for the direct non-RAG flow.
config.chat.globalReactTemplate.descript: Template object used for the repository-wide ReAct flow.
config.chat.localRagTemplate.description: Template object used for isolated code analysis when RAG is disabled.
config.chat.deepReactTemplate.descriptio: Template object used for deep cross-file ReAct analysis.
config.server.modelPath.description: Path to the GGUF model file used by llama-server.
config.server.gpuLayers.description: Number of layers to offload to the GPU (-ngl).
config.server.contextSize.description: Context window size passed to llama-server (-c).
config.server.flashAttention.description: Whether to pass --flash-attn on to llama-server.
config.server.chatCompletionsPath.descri: HTTP path used for chat completions endpoint.
config.chat.ragModeTemplate.description: Template object used for repository-wide RAG prompts.
config.chat.specificFilesModeTemplate.de: Template object used for specific-files prompts.
config.rag.chromaUrl.description: Base URL used to connect to ChromaDB.
config.rag.chromaPort.description: Port used to connect to ChromaDB.
config.rag.excludeFileGlobs.description: Glob patterns of files excluded during indexing.
config.rag.maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum indexed file size in KB.
config.rag.maxIndexedFiles.description: Maximum number of indexed chunks/files in a run.
config.rag.chunkSizeChars.description: Chunk size in characters for index segmentation.
config.rag.chunkOverlapChars.description: Chunk overlap in characters between consecutive chunks.
config.rag.vectorCandidatePool.descripti: Semantic candidate pool size before final ranking.
config.rag.maxQueryResults.description: Maximum retrieved context blocks per query.
config.rag.minCosineSimilarity.descripti: Minimum cosine similarity threshold used by conceptual KNN retrieval.
config.memory.title: Llama Chat Assistant › Memory Management
config.memory.contextWindowSize.descript: Total context window size available in the LLM (defines maximum memory budget).
config.memory.safetyThreshold.descriptio: Token count threshold that triggers automatic memory pruning (typically 80% of context window).
config.memory.preserveSystemPrompt.descr: Whether to keep the system prompt in memory during pruning operations.
config.memory.preserveRecentMessagesCoun: Number of recent conversation messages to always preserve during memory cleanup.
command.openSettings.title: Llama Chat Assistant: Configure
command.moveSidebarRight.title: Llama Chat Assistant: Move Sidebar Right
views.container.title: Llama Chat Assistant
views.chat.name: Llama Chat Assistant
